# MCP Time Server Timezone Validation Tests
# Tests various timezone formats and edge cases

# Build the time server binary
go build -o mcp-time-server .

# Test with various valid IANA timezone names
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"America/Los_Angeles"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"America/Los_Angeles"'
stdout '"datetime"'
stdout '"is_dst"'

# Test with GMT timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"GMT"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"GMT"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test with EST timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"EST"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"EST"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test with Local timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Local"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Local"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test with Australia timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Australia/Sydney"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Australia/Sydney"'
stdout '"datetime"'
stdout '"is_dst"'

# Test with Africa timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Africa/Cairo"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Africa/Cairo"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test timezone conversion between continents
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"Europe/Berlin","time":"18:30","target_timezone":"Australia/Melbourne"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Europe/Berlin"'
stdout '"timezone":"Australia/Melbourne"'
stdout '"time_difference"'

# Test with Pacific timezone islands
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Pacific/Honolulu"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Pacific/Honolulu"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test with Atlantic timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Atlantic/Azores"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Atlantic/Azores"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test invalid timezone formats
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Random/FakeCity"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current time'
stdout 'invalid timezone'

# Test with special characters in timezone name
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"America/Port-au-Prince"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"America/Port-au-Prince"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test with numeric timezone-like names (should fail)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"UTC+5"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current time'
stdout 'invalid timezone'
